message:
test(extras): add PlasmaFx determinism and quality tests (bd-l8x9.4.3)

Add comprehensive tests for PlasmaFx covering:
- No-alloc proxy: buffer capacity stable across renders
- No-alloc internal state: PlasmaFx has no growing buffers
- Quality tier determinism: all tiers produce stable output
- Quality visual complexity: Full vs Minimal variance check
- Hash-based determinism with JSONL logging for regression tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
